abilities.description: Once per situation, when the specter makes a move to ambush or perform a feint, reroll any dice. If in a fight, mark progress on a hit. When they hold a foe at the point of their weapon and make a move aided by the prospect of violence, add +2.

When the specter makes a move with stealth, add +1. If they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by approaching the foe with cunning, roll +their shadow and choose one after rolling.

  • Ensure injury: Add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
  • Ensure pain: Mark progress on a hit.

When the specter @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3129f4caa4754caf]{Takes Decisive Action} by striking a weak spot, you may reroll one challenge die. If you do, the foe's anguish strikes the specter back; the specter must @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1). If they then choose to resist it, roll +their shadow instead of +their spirit or +their heart.
